title: P06 Incident And Safety Envelope System — Complete
exit_criteria_met: Any unexplained material delta opens an incident with typed incident_type from the severity matrix.
Incident severity drives suspension and closure evidence requirements: validate_incident_closure enforces required fields per severity before close_incident_record persists.
IncidentRecord carries severity (S1-S4), sla_class, incident_type, ladder_state_at_incident, and deployed_bundle_id.
list_open_blocking_incidents returns open/monitoring S1 and S2 incidents; S3, S4, and closed incidents are excluded.
INCIDENT_RESPONSE.md runbook references severity matrix, SLA contract, and statistical decision policy.
code_changes: src/agentic_forex/goblin/models.py: added IncidentSeverity, IncidentSlaClass, DeploymentLadderState literals; updated IncidentRecord with severity/sla_class/incident_type/ladder_state_at_incident/deployed_bundle_id; updated IncidentClosurePacket with all severity-driven required fields

src/agentic_forex/goblin/controls.py: updated open_incident_record signature; added validate_incident_closure; updated close_incident_record with severity validation; added list_open_blocking_incidents
src/agentic_forex/goblin/__init__.py: exported IncidentSeverity, IncidentSlaClass, validate_incident_closure, list_open_blocking_incidents
